case_title: PARKMERCED COMPANY, A GENERAL PARNERSHIP vs. KIM, WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A GENERAL PARNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, WILLIAM KIM, SUNNY SUN CHOI, DUK MAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
